case_title: CONCORDIA ARGONAUT VS. GARY E. MOSS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-22-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS, GARY E.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONCORDIA ARGONAUT AS TO DEFENDANT MOSS, GARY E.
